title: The Old Woman with the Knife
posterAlt: The Old Woman with the Knife (2025) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Aging assassin Hornclaw has seen it all, but she never expected to mentor a reckless rookie like Bullfight. As their unlikely bond deepens, cracks form in the underworld they navigate together. When Hornclaw discovers someone wants her dead, she's thrust into a deadly game of deception. With enemies closing in and trust in short supply, survival means staying sharp—both blade and mind.
synopsis: Released in 2025, The Old Woman with the Knife is a action, mystery and drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 16 certification (BE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
